summary: A vertical video, posted by a U.S. Border Patrol El Paso account, documenting a tracking operation near Fort Hancock. It includes a moving shot across flat farmland and bare dirt from a vehicle window, and an overhead aerial (drone) view of three white-and-green Border Patrol pickup trucks parked on a dirt road at the edge of a plowed field, with several figures gathered beside them near a small structure. The audio is a music bed or ambient.

script.scene: Moving shot from a vehicle across flat bare farmland and a dirt verge under a clear sky.
Overhead aerial view of three white-and-green Border Patrol pickups parked on a dirt road beside a plowed field, with several figures gathered near a small structure.
